package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for raw_sql_literal_in_service: Literal SQL strings executed from services instead of repositories or query packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule119NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule119NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule119NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario119Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule119NegativeService, input Rule119NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
